title: Review round 1: Direct messages (1:1 whisper conversations)
notes:
SEC7 CALIBRATION ASSESSMENT:

CORRECTNESS CONFIDENCE: 97% - No correctness bugs found. Core DM logic passes all tests. Architecture invariants #3 (opaque payload) and #4 (identity) are satisfied. Offline queue atomicity matches documented Phase 1 design. SQLite expiry format is correct and tested.

FINDINGS IDENTIFIED:
  1. Missing INDEX on offline_messages.to_pub_id (P2: efficiency issue, not correctness)
  2. Missing periodic cleanup of expired messages (P3: data accumulation at scale)
  3. is_subscribed cached at connect time (P1: separate issue nie-x47.5, not DM-specific)

REAL vs OPINION:
  - The missing index is a REAL engineering issue: O(N) full table scans on every drain()
  - The missing cleanup is REAL but low-priority: slow data creep, only visible 100+ users
  - Prior complaints about 'payload not validated' or 'add ack logic' are OPINION: out of Phase 1 scope

RUNNING OUT OF REAL COMPLAINTS: YES
  - All architectural invariants verified
  - Test oracles are independent and correct
  - No SQL injection, no format bugs, no atomicity issues
  - Remaining issues are performance/maintenance, not logic correctness
  - Further complaints would be bikeshedding without engineering basis
